props.ChoiceText: A household took you in for work, and dependence changed shape without disappearing.
props.ChoiceBio: Being taken in for service changed the terms of your poverty without quite ending it.

0.TargetText: A household superior who once took you in for service.
0.TransitionText: Because being taken in for service changed the terms of your poverty without quite ending it, survival drove you into exhausting work for whatever wage could be had.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Laborer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because being taken in for service changed the terms of your poverty without quite ending it, poverty forced another harsh turn in your life.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because being taken in for service changed the terms of your poverty without quite ending it, suffering turned you toward faith and comfort.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.
